title: R.S. 30:105 to 30:106 not applicable to state lands
doc_html:
§108.  R.S. 30:105 to 30:106 not applicable to state lands

R.S. 30:105 to 30:1061 shall not apply to minerals produced from lands belonging to the state.

1Repealed.  See, now, R.S. 31:210.
